summary: Backend API testing completed for dental implant management system - All 10 test scenarios passed (100% success rate)
critical_code_review_comments: All 7 requested changes verified working correctly in backend
Note: Nurse password in docs is 'nurse123' but actual is 'Nurse@123'

test_credentials.Nurse: nurse1@dental.edu / Nurse@123 (NOT nurse123 as in docs)

seed_data_creation: Test created several TEST_ prefixed procedures and one test user (deleted after test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 backend tests passing. Key findings: 1) User management by implant_incharge working, 2) Sunday blocked, Saturday 9:30 only restriction working, 3) All supervisors have 'supervisor' role not 'instructor', 4) Full Phase 1->Phase 2 workflow works with auto-approve when same person is both supervisor AND implant_incharge, 5) Students and nurses correctly blocked from approving (403)

test_results_summary.test_01_abhijit_can_create_user: PASSED - implant_incharge can create users via POST /api/users
test_results_summary.test_02_abhijit_can_delete_user: PASSED - implant_incharge can delete users via DELETE /api/users/{id}
test_results_summary.test_04_saturday_wrong_time_blocked: PASSED - Saturday 10:00 blocked with 400, only 9:30 allowed
test_results_summary.test_06_supervisors_have_correct_role: PASSED - All 4 supervisors (Rajeshree, Vasantha, Rupali, Pankaj) have role 'supervisor' not 'instructor'
test_results_summary.test_07_full_phase1_to_phase2_workflow: PASSED - Complete workflow: create -> phase1 approve -> submit phase2 -> phase2 approve -> phase2_approved status
test_results_summary.test_08_auto_approve_same_person_both_ro: PASSED - Single approval by Dr. Abhijit (who is both supervisor AND implant_incharge) sets both approval flags
test_results_summary.test_09_student_cannot_approve: PASSED - Student gets 403 when trying to approve
test_results_summary.test_10_nurse_cannot_approve: PASSED - Nurse gets 403 when trying to approve
